name: Sugimoto & Co., Ltd.
summary: Sugimoto & Co., Ltd. engages in the sale, import, and export of machinery and equipment in Japan and internationally. The company offers machines and measuring equipment, and test machines; cutting tools and working equipment; pneumatic tools, hydraulic, and pneumatic equipment; electric tools, conduction equipment, and working tools; and pipe-working equipment and OA equipment. Sugimoto & Co., Ltd. was founded in 1921 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
